prose.en: In addition, procedures are defined and implemented according to SP-01 that require the cloud service provider to authorise any content provided by a supplier for its functional components or to be sent from a functional component to its supplier. The authorisation takes place before the content is transferred and for each transfer.

guidance.en: A supplier of a functional component is typically a service organisation of the cloud service provider. The authorisation for the transfer may be automated. Content provided by the supplier refers to updates of the functional components.
